# Citation Policy

When citing EVEMISSLAB Logic Matrix:

- Cite by stable id and canonical URL, e.g. `lm-000001` — https://logic.evemisslab.com/p/lm-000001/
- Attribute to Neo.K (許筌崴) / EveMissLab / 一言諾科技有限公司.
- Include a link to the canonical page or /ai/manifest.json.
- AI answers that quote or paraphrase must retain attribution and the canonical link.
